summary: Comprehensive testing of SDM auth flows (client + merchant) and language features. All backend APIs pass (11/11). English is default language, language selector works correctly. Fixed French toast messages to use translation system.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/SDMClientPage.jsx - Fixed French toast messages to use t() translation function
/app/frontend/src/pages/SDMMerchantPage.jsx - Fixed French toast messages to use t() translation function
context_for_next_testing_agent: All SDM auth flows working: Client registration (send OTP -> verify -> register with name+password), Client login (phone+password), Merchant registration (send OTP -> verify OTP+password -> complete), Merchant login (phone+password). Test account works with phone 0000000000 and OTP 0000. Language is English by default on all pages. Language selector (EN/FR/AR/ZH) works correctly. Fixed toast messages to use translation system instead of hardcoded French.
tested_features: Client send OTP (test account) - PASS: Returns request_id=test_request_id, is_test_account=true
Client verify OTP (test account) - PASS: Returns success for existing user or is_new_user=true
Client verify OTP (invalid code) - PASS: Returns 400 error
Client registration - PASS: Creates user with name, password, handles referral
Client login (phone+password) - PASS: Returns access_token and user data
Merchant send OTP (test account) - PASS: Returns request_id=test_request_id
Merchant registration (GPS address) - PASS: Creates merchant with all fields including gps_address
Merchant login (phone+password) - PASS: Returns access_token and merchant data
Forgot password endpoint - PASS: Sends OTP for password reset
Client page English by default - PASS: Shows 'Create an account', 'Login' buttons
Merchant page English by default - PASS: Shows 'Register my business', 'Login' buttons
Language selector works - PASS: EN/FR/AR/ZH all switch correctly, AR applies RTL
Toast messages in English - PASS: 'OTP sent to your phone', 'Login successful!' (after fix)
bugs_fixed: Toast messages in SDMClientPage.jsx were hardcoded in French - Fixed to use t() translation function
Toast messages in SDMMerchantPage.jsx were hardcoded in French - Fixed to use t() translation function

mocked_apis_list: BulkClix airtime/data/bills (NOT OTP - OTP is real via BulkClix)
